Title: User Access - First Access - Registration Process
Preconditions: User has not accessed the app before.
Test Steps:
1. User accesses the app.
2. System checks if it's the first access.
3. System prompts for registration.
4. User enters valid registration details.
5. System processes the registration.
6. System redirects to the home page.
Expected Result: User is successfully registered and redirected to the home page.

Title: User Access - Already Registered - Login Process
Preconditions: User has already registered.
Test Steps:
1. User accesses the app.
2. System checks if it's the first access.
3. System prompts for login.
4. User enters valid login credentials.
5. System processes the login.
6. System redirects to the home page.
Expected Result: User is successfully logged in and redirected to the home page.

Title: Journey Process - Ongoing Journey - Emissions Calculation
Preconditions: User is currently on a journey.
Test Steps:
1. User is on the home page.
2. System checks if a journey is ongoing.
3. System starts the journey.
4. System checks if the journey is completed.
5. System calculates emissions.
6. System redirects to the home page.
Expected Result: Emissions are calculated and the user is redirected to the home page.

Title: Journey Process - No Ongoing Journey - Section Change
Preconditions: User is not on a journey.
Test Steps:
1. User is on the home page.
2. System checks if a journey is ongoing.
3. System prompts for section change.
4. User selects a valid section change.
5. System provides a horizontal menu.
6. System redirects to the home page.
Expected Result: User is shown a horizontal menu and redirected to the home page.

Title: Statistics - View Weekly Report
Preconditions: User is on the statistics menu.
Test Steps:
1. User is on the statistics menu.
2. System prompts to view a weekly report.
3. User requests to view the weekly report.
4. System generates the weekly report.
5. System returns to the statistics menu.
Expected Result: Weekly report is generated and the user is returned to the statistics menu.

Title: Statistics - No Weekly Report Request
Preconditions: User is on the statistics menu.
Test Steps:
1. User is on the statistics menu.
2. System prompts to view a weekly report.
3. User declines to view the weekly report.
4. System returns to the statistics menu.
Expected Result: The user is returned to the statistics menu without generating a report.

Title: Profile Management - Update Account Data
Preconditions: User is on the profile management menu.
Test Steps:
1. User is on the profile management menu.
2. System prompts to update account data.
3. User confirms to update account data.
4. User enters valid new data.
5. System updates the account data.
6. System returns to the profile management menu.
Expected Result: Account data is updated and the user is returned to the profile management menu.

Title: Profile Management - Logout
Preconditions: User is on the profile management menu.
Test Steps:
1. User is on the profile management menu.
2. System prompts to update account data.
3. User declines to update account data.
4. User requests to logout.
5. System logs the user out.
6. System returns to the home page.
Expected Result: User is logged out and redirected to the home page.

Title: Login Process - Invalid Credentials
Preconditions: User attempts to log in with invalid credentials.
Test Steps:
1. User accesses the app.
2. System checks if it's the first access.
3. System prompts for login.
4. User enters invalid login credentials.
5. System processes the login attempt.
6. System displays an error message.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating invalid credentials.

Title: Login Process - Empty Credentials
Preconditions: User attempts to log in with empty credentials.
Test Steps:
1. User accesses the app.
2. System checks if it's the first access.
3. System prompts for login.
4. User enters empty login credentials.
5. System processes the login attempt.
6. System displays an error message.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating empty credentials.

Title: Journey Process - No Ongoing Journey - No Section Change
Preconditions: User is not on a journey.
Test Steps:
1. User is on the home page.
2. System checks if a journey is ongoing.
3. System prompts for section change.
4. User declines to change sections.
5. System returns to the home page.
Expected Result: The user is returned to the home page without any changes.

Title: Statistics - No Weekly Report Request - No Section Change
Preconditions: User is on the statistics menu.
Test Data: No weekly report request and no section change request.
Test Steps:
1. User is on the statistics menu.
2. System prompts to view a weekly report.
3. User declines to view the weekly report.
4. System prompts for section change.
5. User declines to change sections.
6. System returns to the statistics menu.
Expected Result: The user is returned to the statistics menu without any changes.

Title: Profile Management - No Data Update - No Section Change
Preconditions: User is on the profile management menu.
Test Data: No data update request and no section change request.
Test Steps:
1. User is on the profile management menu.
2. System prompts to update account data.
3. User declines to update account data.
4. System prompts for section change.
5. User declines to change sections.
6. System returns to the profile management menu.
Expected Result: The user is returned to the profile management menu without any changes.

Title: Login Process - First Access - Registration Failure
Preconditions: User attempts to register but fails.
Test Steps:
1. User accesses the app.
2. System checks if it's the first access.
3. System prompts for registration.
4. User enters invalid registration details.
5. System processes the registration attempt.
6. System displays an error message.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating registration failure.

Title: Journey Process - Ongoing Journey - Emissions Calculation Failure
Preconditions: User is currently on a journey.
Test Steps:
1. User is on the home page.
2. System checks if a journey is ongoing.
3. System starts the journey.
4. System checks if the journey is completed.
5. System calculates emissions using invalid data.
6. System displays an error message.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating emissions calculation failure.

Title: Statistics - View Weekly Report - Report Generation Failure
Preconditions: User requests to view a weekly report.
Test Steps:
1. User is on the statistics menu.
2. System prompts to view a weekly report.
3. User requests to view the weekly report.
4. System generates the weekly report using invalid parameters.
5. System displays an error message.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating report generation failure.

Title: Profile Management - Update Account Data - Data Update Failure
Preconditions: User attempts to update account data.
Test Steps:
1. User is on the profile management menu.
2. System prompts to update account data.
3. User enters invalid new data.
4. System attempts to update the account data.
5. System displays an error message.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating data update failure.
